title: Poseidon’s Secret Emerges
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is poseidon’s secret emerges.
scene: The scene follows poseidon’s secret emerges, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He sliced through the steel shells like they were made of fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was that giant slash just now?! the scythe of death himself ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's a whirlwind of razor-sharp death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Run for it!! It'll slice us to pieces!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How far is it gonna keep chasing us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Take out Shirahoshii at all costs !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's the sea-urchin- cloaked spike squad!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: time to riddle that leg- fighter with holes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's nowhere for you to run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji-san, it's dangerous to just stand there! What are you...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: through rain and through snow, through lightning and thunder... onward and onward I ran...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's almost nostalgic, looking back on it.Now... I ran like the wind... endlessly fleeing from the monsters that pursued me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When it seemed there was nowhere left to run...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey there, punks. If you've got business with Shirahoshii-chan ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...you'll have to get past me first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Holy ... what the hell is that?!

summary: Poseidon’s Secret Emerges. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
